title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL technologies. The lecture teaches best practices for efficient data storage and querying in production environments. The course is offered through Harvard University via edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School.
